metadata.name: Run Loops and Conditional Commands
metadata.description: Create for loops to iterate through items and use if/then/else statements for conditional execution
objectives: Create a for loop to iterate through a list of items from the command line and in a shell script
Create an if/then/else statement that executes different commands based on a condition being true or false
prerequisites: Access to workstation, servera, and serverb machines

tasks.name: Verify ~/bin directory exists
tasks.description: The bin subdirectory should exist in the student home directory
hints: This directory should be in your PATH automatically

tasks.name: Verify printhostname.sh script exists
tasks.description: The printhostname.sh script should exist in ~/bin

tasks.name: Verify script has proper shebang
hints: The first line of the script should be: #!/usr/bin/bash

tasks.name: Verify script is executable
tasks.description: The printhostname.sh script should have execute permissions

tasks.name: Verify script contains for loop
tasks.description: The script should contain a for loop iterating over servera and serverb
tasks.success_message: Script contains for loop with servera and serverb
tasks.failure_message: Script does not contain proper for loop
hints: Use: for host in servera serverb; do ... done
The loop should iterate over both servera and serverb

tasks.name: Verify script runs hostname command via SSH
tasks.description: The script should SSH to hosts and run the hostname command
tasks.success_message: Script uses SSH to run hostname command
tasks.failure_message: Script does not use SSH to run hostname
hints: This runs the hostname command on the remote server

tasks.name: Verify script contains if/then/else statement
tasks.description: The script should contain conditional logic to check for servera
tasks.failure_message: Script does not contain proper if/then/else statement
hints: Check if the host variable equals 'servera'

tasks.name: Verify script executes successfully
tasks.description: Running the script should complete with exit code 0
tasks.success_message: Script executes successfully with exit code 0
hints: Check for syntax errors in your script
Verify SSH connectivity to servera and serverb
